---
title: "test_odin_scenarios.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/test_odin_scenarios.py"
loc: 16
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.52
style_score: 3.70
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 7.43
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_generate_scenario_deterministic, test_generate_scenario_different_turn. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.scenarios](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.scenarios)

### Exports
- `test_generate_scenario_deterministic`
- `test_generate_scenario_different_turn`
